s: Music player designed with Material You
d:
Features
  • Enjoy your music in MP3, FLAC, OGG, OPUS, WAV, M4A, and more
  • No ads, no telemetry, no analytics — ever
  • Network access is off by default and must be turned on in Settings
  • Smart Shuffle — Pure (mathematically unbiased) and Smart (avoids repeating artists)
  • Per-track embedded artwork — show the cover stored inside each file
  • Synchronized lyrics from LRCLIB with karaoke-style timed display
  • Manual lyrics import with automatic charset detection (UTF-8 and Latin-1)
  • Browse tracks, albums, artists, and genres; create and manage playlists
  • Smart Playlists — Recently Added and Random Mix, always up to date
  • Export playlists to M3U files for use in other music apps
  • Global search across tracks, albums, artists, genres, and playlists
  • Loved tracks — mark favorites and browse them in one place
  • Listening Stats — most played, most listened, recently played, top artists
  • Backup and restore playlists and loved tracks to a JSON file
  • Sleep timer with presets (15/30/45/60/90 min) and finish-current-track
  • Quick Settings tile for play/pause
  • Edit metadata tags or fetch accurate info from MusicBrainz
  • OPUS metadata editing — title, album, artist, genre, year, track number, lyrics
  • Share tracks via the system share sheet
  • Crash logs saved locally — share them manually, nothing is sent automatically
  • Designed with Material You and dynamic color palettes
All music stays on your device. Network access is off by default and must be turned on in Settings — LRCLIB lyrics lookups and MusicBrainz metadata queries are opt-in only.
